name: CheckboxCard
description: Selectable bordered card with a checkbox indicator, label/sublabel/badge, optional description, and an optional leading visual. The whole card is one clickable button.
sourceNote: Figma exposes 6 rigid 'type' variants (Basic/Left Icon/Avatar/Card Provider/Brand/Company), the last three baking in specific brand logo images (Mastercard, Spotify). Instead of hardcoding those raster assets, this component exposes a generic `leading` ReactNode slot — pass an icon, , or an as needed.

badge.description: Renders a light-blue Badge with this text

leading.description: Optional icon / Avatar / logo shown at the start of the card
